title: Zettle Payout Info
description: Payout-related information from a merchant's Zettle liquid account.

totalBalance.description: The account balance in the currency's smallest unit. Can be negative when refunds exceed sales.

currencyId.description: The ISO 4217 currency code of the account (e.g. GBP).

nextPayoutAmount.description: The amount of money to be paid out to the merchant in the currency's smallest unit.

discountRemaining.description: The remaining amount of discounts from merchant vouchers in the currency's smallest unit.

periodicity.description: The payout period configured by the merchant.
